auto-connect.title: Automatically connect on start
auto-connect.description: If toggled, the extension will connect when the browser starts to where it was last connected.

controllable.description: If set to true then user can toggle this feature.

controlMessage.description: A message for users to explain why the feature is locked when it is.

crash-reports.title: Send anonymous reports when an error occurs
crash-reports.description: If toggled, anonymized data will be collected on crashes.

notification.title: Emit device notification when connecting/disconnected
notification.description: If toggled, notification pop when an event occurs.

prevent-webrtc-leak.title: Prevent IP leak via WebRTC
prevent-webrtc-leak.description: If toggled, policy disable_non_proxied_udp will be used so IP cannot be discovered via WebRTC peer-to-peer, however some website using this feature without any fallback may cease to work.

secure-core.title: Secure-Core (use 2-country circuits)
secure-core.description: If toggled, list of location will propose circuits entering in one country and exiting in another one.

split-tunneling.title: Split-Tunneling, decide which websites are protected by VPN
split-tunneling.description: Mode (exclude or include the list), and a list of include/exclude items (only items matching the currently selected mode applies, other remain hidden unless the setting get switched).

withSubDomains.description: Either sub-domains of the domain should also be considered

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.description: If toggled, send anonymized events that will help Proton to work around censorship.
